hooks.command: PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && STALE=0 && for cli in skynet genisys legion; do [ -f "$PLUGIN_DIR/bin/$cli" ] && { EXPECTED="$PLUGIN_DIR/bin/$cli" && CURRENT=$(readlink "$HOME/.local/bin/$cli" 2>/dev/null || echo '') && [ "$CURRENT" = "$EXPECTED" ] || STALE=1; }; done && if [ "$STALE" -eq 1 ]; then bash "$PLUGIN_DIR/bin/setup.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'setup run' || echo 'setup failed'; else echo 'setup run'; fi

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && export PLUGIN_DIR && bash -c 'source "$PLUGIN_DIR/lib/sources.sh" && source_sync "--all" "true"' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'source-sync run' || echo 'source-sync failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/core/user-priority.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'user-priority loaded' || echo 'user-priority failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/greet.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'greet loaded' || echo 'greet failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:SessionStart/,/@end:SessionStart/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/auto-discover-skills.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'auto-discover loaded' || echo 'auto-discover failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/session/use-skills.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'use-skills loaded' || echo 'use-skills failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/core/user-priority.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'user-priority loaded' || echo 'user-priority failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/auto-bump-before-commit.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'auto-bump loaded' || echo 'auto-bump failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/output/footer-usage.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'footer-usage loaded' || echo 'footer-usage failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/suffix-bump.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'suffix-bump loaded' || echo 'suffix-bump failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/changelog-before-commit.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'changelog loaded' || echo 'changelog failed'

PLUGIN_DIR=$(python3 -c "import json,os; d=json.load(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json'))); print(d['plugins']['skynet@cc-skynet'][0]['installPath'])") && awk '/@hook:UserPromptSubmit/,/@end:UserPromptSubmit/' "$PLUGIN_DIR/rules/versioning/sync-prerequisites.md" | grep -v '@hook:\|@end:' && echo 'sync-prerequisites loaded' || echo 'sync-prerequisites failed'
